purpose_context: Following a post-implementation architectural review and code-quality audit, several defects and gaps were identified across the design system packages and demo applications. This mission addresses all outstanding items: C-202 token violations in sk-nav-pill, component boundary concerns flagged as blocking a 1.0 publish, missing JS module distribution for the drawer toggle, fragile CSS patterns in the dashboard demo, absent light/dark story coverage across all Storybook entries, demo pages that are invisible in the live deployment, and a README that does not reflect the project vision or guide new contributors.
purpose_tldr: Fix token compliance violations, restructure nav-pill component boundary, publish demo pages to the live Storybook site, and improve documentation quality.
